sample_generation.question: What is the primary subject and policy mandate notified under DGFT Trade Policy Document 09/2024-25?
sample_generation.ground_truth_answer: According to DGFT Trade Policy Document 09/2024-25 (dated 23/07/2024), the primary subject is: Verification of authenticity of Licences, Authorisations, Scrips. Specifically, the document mandates: Dated: 23rd July 2024 Trade Notice No. All Customs Commissionerates 2.
sample_generation.model_generated_answer: According to DGFT Trade Policy Document 09/2024-25 (dated 23/07/2024), the primary subject is: Verification of authenticity of Licences, Authorisations, Scrips, Certificates, Instruments etc. issued by DGFT using the UDIN. Specifically, the document mandates: Dated: 23rd July 2024 Trade Notice No. All Regional Authorities 3. All Members of Trade & Industry Subject: Verification of authenticity of Licences, Authorisations, Scrips, Certificates, Instruments etc. issued by DGFT using the UDIN –reg Reference is drawn to the requests received from time-to-time for verification of authorisation of Licences, Authorisations, Scrips, Certificates, Instruments
